# CodeSurf Workspace Memory ‚Äî contex (collaborator-clone)

*Generated 2026-04-24. Workspace: `/Users/jkneen/clawd/collaborator-clone`. Branch: `feature/event-bus-mcp`. Package: `codesurf` v0.1.0, productName: `CodeSurf`.*

*Auto-generated by the dreaming subsystem. Do not add human-authored long-term instructions here ‚Äî use CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md instead.*

---

## Overview

Electron infinite-canvas workspace ("Contex" / "CodeSurf") where AI agents and developers collaborate via canvas tiles (terminal, code editor, browser, kanban, chat). Active development on `feature/event-bus-mcp`. Two major workstreams active today: **Solo Harvest** (session backend push) across ~13 sessions, and a new **keyless local auth** plan for Claude + Codex providers.

---

## Durable Facts

- **SDK version**: `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` `0.2.118`. Requires both `permissionMode: 'bypassPermissions'` AND `allowDangerouslySkipPermissions: true`. Docs/CLAUDE.md showing `0.2.79` are stale.
- **Claude Agent SDK auth is already ambient** ‚Äî `createSession()` reads `~/.claude/` credentials written by `claude login`. No `apiKey` parameter exists. The only blocker to keyless operation is the UI guard and settings label.
- **Codex app-server auth is already ambient** ‚Äî manages its own OAuth credential cache; keyless once `codex login` has run.
- **Voice (OpenAI TTS/STT) still requires `OPENAI_API_KEY`** ‚Äî no local fallback; deferred.
- **MCP port is random** ‚Äî always read from `~/.contex/mcp-server.json`, never hardcode.
- **Memory loader**: `bin/memory-loader.mjs` injects `.codesurf/DREAMING.md` into every chat and Codex session ‚Äî confirmed working.
- **App.tsx is ~1700 LOC** ‚Äî all 2D canvas physics lives here. Changes ripple widely; be surgical.
- **IPC naming**: `{feature}:{action}` ‚Äî e.g. `workspace:list`, `canvas:save`, `terminal:write`, `bus:publish`.
- **`universal` scope in `NODE_MCP_TOOLSETS`** ‚Äî tools here (`tile_context_get`, `tile_context_set`, etc.) are NOT peer-bridge tools. Use `getPeerBridgeNodeTools()` (excludes `universal`), not `getAllNodeTools()`, when building bridge dispatch sets.
- **Style**: dark `#1e1e1e`/`#252525`/`#333`, Tailwind + inline `React.CSSProperties`, strict TS, no semicolons, 2-space indent, trailing commas. No emoji anywhere.
- **Persistence**: file-based only, no cloud sync. Auto-save with 500 ms debounce to `~/.contex/workspaces/{id}/canvas.json`.
- **Build warnings**: Vite chunking warnings for `PanelLayout.tsx` and `MediaTile.tsx` are pre-existing, not regressions.
- **`cluso-widget`**: optional local file dependency (`file:../agentation-real`) ‚Äî may not exist in all environments.
- **Test script**: `package.json` `test` broadened to `node --test test/*.test.ts test/main/*.test.mjs test/sidebar/*.test.mjs test/daemon/*.test.mjs` (was daemon-only).

---

## Stable Subsystems

- **Dreaming daemon** ‚Äî `packages/codesurf-dreaming/`, `src/main/ipc/dreaming.ts`. Orphan-run reconciliation and stderr sanitization landed. Daemon owns run state, locking, provider execution, cancellation, and persistent run records.
- **Auto-dreaming UI** ‚Äî `MainStatusBar.tsx`, `mainStatusBarDreaming.ts`, `SettingsPanel.tsx` wired for dreaming state; `shared/types.ts` extended with dreaming types.
- **Chat IPC stream** ‚Äî `src/main/ipc/stream.ts`. All three providers (Claude, Codex, OpenCode) stream via NDJSON/SSE.
- **Event bus** ‚Äî `src/main/event-bus.ts`. Main-process pub/sub; wildcard subscriptions; ring-buffer 500 events/channel; no persistence.
- **Session tools** ‚Äî `firstMeaningfulTitleLine` / `isSessionTitleBoilerplateLine` boilerplate filters and session open intent detection landed.
- **Chip row layout** ‚Äî `CHAT_CHIP_ROW_STYLE` and `renderChipRow` helper with per-message lookup maps; live composer activity chip pinned above composer.

## Active: Uncommitted Dirty Tree (browser/chat peer tool-sharing fix, ~21 files)

**`src/shared/nodeTools.ts`** ‚Äî new exports: `CONTEX_MCP_TOOL_PREFIX`, `getPeerBridgeNodeTools()`, `getDisconnectedPeerBridgeMcpToolNames()`, `buildPeerCommandPayload()`, `toContexMcpToolName()`, `normalizeNodeToolName()`

**`src/main/ipc/chat.ts`** ‚Äî `syncPeerLinks()` extracted and called for ALL local providers; `mcpEnabled?: boolean` on `ChatRequest`; null tool permission ID fallback; `disallowedPeerBridgeTools` passed to Claude.

**`src/main/mcp-server.ts`** ‚Äî `getAllTools()` deduplicates; bridge handler uses `getPeerBridgeNodeTools()`; `buildPeerCommandPayload()` for consistent payload shape.

Other: `session-sources.ts`, `preload/index.ts`; renderer: `App.tsx`, `ChatTile.tsx`, `MediaTile.tsx`, `PanelLayout.tsx`, `Sidebar.tsx`, `sidebar/session-ordering.ts`; 8 test files updated.

## Active: Keyless Local Auth Plan (in-progress, not yet committed)

**Goal**: Let users already logged in via `claude` CLI or `codex` CLI use those providers without entering API keys.

**Claude changes needed**:
- `src/main/ipc/chat.ts` ‚Äî remove/relax `CLAUDE_API_KEY` guard; call `createSession()` unconditionally; surface auth errors as chat error messages
- `SettingsPanel.tsx` ‚Äî relabel: *"Claude API Key ‚Äî leave blank if you ran `claude login`"*
- Optional: check `~/.claude/credentials.json` for `claudeLocalAuthPresent` IPC boolean

**Codex changes needed**:
- `src/main/ipc/chat.ts` Codex branch ‚Äî remove API-key check blocking subprocess spawn; emit chat error if `codex` exits with auth error
- Settings UI ‚Äî relabel: *"OpenAI / Codex API Key ‚Äî leave blank if you ran `codex login`"*
- Optional: check `~/.codex/auth.json` for `codexLocalAuthPresent` IPC boolean

**Explicitly deferred**: Voice TTS/STT ‚Äî still requires `OPENAI_API_KEY`; add UI note.

**Estimated scope**: ~75 min total (30 min IPC guards, 15 min labels, 30 min auth detection helpers).

## Known Dead Ends

| Tried | Why failed |
|---|---|
| `flexWrap: 'nowrap'` on chip container rows | Clips chips; use `CHAT_CHIP_ROW_STYLE` (wrap on container) |
| Hardcoding MCP port | Port is random; read from `~/.contex/mcp-server.json` |
| `getAllNodeTools()` in bridge `nodeToolNames` | Includes `universal` scope; use `getPeerBridgeNodeTools()` |
| Routing `tile_context_get` through node-to-node bridge | Swallows call; context tools stay on real handlers |
| `null` tool permission ID from SDK | Leaves tool pending; generate fallback ID |
| Peer links only for Claude | Other providers drop peer tools silently; sync for all local providers |
| New renderer components for memory loading | Violates chat UI manifest rule; use existing chip components |
| Requiring API key to start Claude/Codex provider | Auth is already ambient in `~/.claude/` and codex credential cache |
